# Nomba One

> Nomba One is a subscription-billing engine on Nomba (Nigerian payments): plans, cycles, proration, dunning, and settlement over card, direct debit, bank transfer, and crypto. Money is integer kobo, recorded in a double-entry ledger; multi-tenant, with per-organization sub-account settlement. These docs are honest about the hard parts (thin balances, card OTP, push vs pull rails) and every runnable example hits the real sandbox.

This is the agent index. Every link points at a clean Markdown mirror (append `.md` to any docs URL). For the full inlined corpus, see https://docs.nombaone.xyz/llms-full.txt

## Get started

- [Authentication](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/authentication.md): The per-organization nbo_sandbox_ / nbo_live_ secret key, and how it works.
- [Environments](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/environments.md): The two axes: deployment environment vs account mode, and how a key pins every request to sandbox or live.
- [Your first subscription](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/your-first-subscription.md): Create a plan, a price, and a subscription that bills, end to end.
- [Verify us in your devtools](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/verify-in-your-devtools.md): Fire a real signed webhook and watch it land in your own logs.

## CLI, SDKs, & Libraries

- [Quickstart](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/quickstart.md): Get a sandbox key and reach your first real subscription in minutes.
- [Node.js](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/quickstart/node.md)
- [Next.js](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/quickstart/nextjs.md)
- [Python](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/quickstart/python.md)
- [Go](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/quickstart/go.md)
- [PHP](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/quickstart/php.md)
- [Ruby](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/quickstart/ruby.md)
- [cURL](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/getting-started/quickstart/curl.md)

## Guides

- [Create plans and prices](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/guides/create-plans-and-prices.md): Model your pricing: plans, prices, intervals, and trials.
- [Start a subscription](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/guides/start-a-subscription.md): Subscribe a customer on any rail: card, direct debit, transfer.
- [Handle webhooks](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/guides/handle-webhooks.md): Receive, verify, and dedupe events; keep one correct balance.
- [Dunning and recovery](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/guides/dunning-and-recovery.md): Recover a failed charge on a thin balance, the Nigerian way.
- [Refunds, payouts & settlement](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/guides/refunds-payouts-settlement.md): Move money back out: refunds, escrow, and payouts to a bank.
- [Proration and plan changes](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/guides/proration-and-plan-changes.md): Upgrade, downgrade, and switch intervals mid-cycle, correctly.
- [Coupons and credits](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/guides/coupons-and-credits.md): Discounts, credit grants, and how they resolve on an invoice.
- [Going live](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/guides/going-live.md): The checklist to move from a sandbox key to real money.

## Cookbook

- [Overview](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/cookbook.md): Task-focused recipes for common Nomba One billing jobs.

## Concepts

- [How billing works](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/how-billing-works.md): Cycles, invoices, collection, and the state machine underneath.
- [Money is integer kobo](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/money-is-integer-kobo.md): Why every amount is integer kobo, and the 100× naira trap.
- [The double-entry ledger](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/the-ledger.md): The source of truth: every leg of every movement, debits and credits.
- [Multi-rail: push and pull](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/multi-rail-push-and-pull.md): Card and mandate pull; transfer pushes. Why the asymmetry matters.
- [Settlement & sub-accounts](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/settlement-and-sub-accounts.md): How a collection splits and settles to a merchant's Nomba sub-account.

## Best practices

- [Overview](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts.md): The truths most payments docs hide, told in the open, each runnable.
- [The double-charge trap](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/the-double-charge-bug.md)
- [Dunning for thin balances](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/dunning-for-thin-balances.md)
- [Bank transfer isn't a 'method'](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/bank-transfer-is-not-just-another-method.md)
- [Card tokens expire](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/card-tokens-expire.md)
- [When a transfer doesn't match the invoice](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/when-a-transfer-does-not-match-the-invoice.md)
- [Retrying the webhook ≠ retrying the charge](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/retry-the-webhook-is-not-retry-the-charge.md)
- [Mandates and consent](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/mandates-and-consent.md)
- [Proration is a ledger problem](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/proration-is-a-ledger-problem.md)
- [The end-of-month billing trap](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/the-end-of-month-billing-trap.md)
- [Voluntary vs involuntary churn](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/voluntary-vs-involuntary-churn.md)
- [Settlement without spreadsheets](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/settlement-without-spreadsheets.md)
- [A scheduler that survives a crash](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/scheduler-that-survives-a-crash.md)
- [Isolation is a data-model property](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/isolation-is-a-data-model-property.md)
- [What to check before you trust a billing layer](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/concepts/hard-parts/what-to-check-before-you-trust-a-billing-layer.md)

## API reference

- [Glossary](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/reference/glossary.md): One word, one meaning: the canonical vocabulary.
- [Example](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/reference/examples.md): The deletable worked example (removed with the scaffold).

## Webhooks

- [Overview](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/webhooks/overview.md): How outbound events reach your endpoints.
- [Event catalog](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/webhooks/event-catalog.md): Every event type, when it fires, and its payload.
- [Signing & verification](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/webhooks/signing-and-verification.md): Verify a delivery's signature and timestamp.
- [Retries & replay](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/webhooks/retries-and-replay.md): The retry cadence, dead-letters, and replay.
- [Delivery guarantee](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/webhooks/delivery-guarantee.md): At least once, deduped on event id, never exactly once.
- [Simulate an event](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/webhooks/simulate.md): Fire a real signed event to your endpoint on demand (sandbox).

## Errors

- [Error reference](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/errors.md): Every error code, what triggers it, and exactly how to fix it.

## Sandbox toolkit

- [Overview](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/sandbox-toolkit/overview.md): Drive the engine deterministically: no real card, no cron wait.
- [Sandbox payment methods](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/sandbox-toolkit/payment-methods.md): Deterministic success / decline / OTP methods.
- [The sandbox clock](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/sandbox-toolkit/clock.md): Advance a subscription's next cycle on demand.
- [Simulate webhooks](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/sandbox-toolkit/simulate-webhooks.md): Emit and deliver any catalog event on demand.

## Release notes

- [Changelog](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/changelog.md): Every API change, dated, with migration notes.

## Migrate

- [Overview](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/migrate/overview.md): Move to Nomba One from another processor.
- [Coming from Paystack](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/migrate/from-paystack.md): Map Paystack's subscription gotchas to our clean equivalents.
- [Coming from Stripe Billing](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/migrate/from-stripe.md): Move a Stripe Billing integration to Nomba One.
- [Coming from Flutterwave](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/migrate/from-flutterwave.md): Map Flutterwave's tx_ref/flw_ref tangle to one reference.
- [From any processor](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/migrate/generic.md): A zero-downtime parallel-run playbook.

## For agents

- [Agent-native docs](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/agents.md): llms.txt, a Markdown mirror of every page, and one-click copy-to-AI.

## For merchants

- [Overview](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/merchants/overview.md): Run subscriptions without an engineer.
- [Create a plan](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/merchants/create-a-plan.md): Set up a plan and price from the console.
- [Share a payment link](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/merchants/share-a-payment-link.md): Collect a subscription with a link, no code.
- [Set up dunning messages](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/merchants/set-up-dunning-messages.md): What your customer sees when a charge fails.
- [Read a settlement](https://docs.nombaone.xyz/merchants/read-a-settlement.md): Understand a payout and where your money is.
